title: CAR MODEL detail page » MAGAZINE ISSUES
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the CAR MODEL detail page to show all connected MAGAZINE ISSUES
So I can ...
description:
* The CAR MODEL detail page contains a section with a list of all connected MAGAZINE ISSUES.
* Each MAGAZINE ISSUE in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each MAGAZINE ISSUE in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each MAGAZINE ISSUE in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no MAGAZINE ISSUE connected to the CAR MODEL then the section is not displayed at all.
